title: Qoder 越来越猛了，Browser Use 让 Agent 的联网能力拉满。
abstract: Qoder 越来越猛了，Browser Use 让 Agent 的联网能力拉满。 simplifies AI automation by letting you describe workflows in natural language and then executing them step by step. Ideal for teams with more ideas than hands...
id: qoder-越来越猛了-browser-use-让-agent-的联网能力拉满
abstract_zh: 伙计，Qoder和**Browser Use**这对CP简直神助攻！上网能力max，效率直线上升，让你的工作像打了鸡血一样亢奋！
